message_text: I need to discuss this because your outstanding amount looks incorrect to me.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing account ****7712 with a current amount due of 16,480. Before I can review the balance concern, please verify your identity using either your full name or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
The last 2 digits are 07. Please review the ledger with me, because I believe some prior payments are not reflected in that 16,480 balance.

Your verification is accepted. I cannot review a payment ledger in chat because the borrower and loan records are unavailable in the current system view. I have noted that you dispute the 16,480 balance on account ****7712 and report prior payments may be missing. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Next priority: phone contact to review payment history/ledger and validate whether prior payments affect the stated balance."}

Understood. Please have someone send me the payment ledger or a reconciliation of the 16,480 balance, because I’m not agreeing to any payment until the prior payments are accounted for.

I can record that position. In this chat, I can’t provide the ledger or reconcile prior payments because the payment-history view is not available here. Your request for a payment ledger/reconciliation of the 16,480 balance is noted, and no payment arrangement is being accepted in this conversation. If you want contact only when that review is available, I’ll record that as a limited contact preference.
